expectations.text: Does the output include the 'TARGET: [Project Name] - RECOMMENDED DESIGN SYSTEM' block?
expectations.evidence: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md contains the full breakdown with 'Concept: The Digital Vault'.

expectations.text: Does the design avoid generic purple/pink 'AI' gradients?

expectations.name: lucide_icons_used
expectations.text: Are Lucide icons (SVG) used instead of emojis?
expectations.evidence: Lucide CDN is used and icons are called via data-lucide.

expectations.text: Is there a mention or evidence of the Pre-delivery Checklist being run?
expectations.evidence: CHECKLIST.md is present and fully checked.
